productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Leatherette Olive Handbag
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 32 cm Width: 45cm Depth: 15 cm Made of blended fabric for durability Has one zippered compartment, two inner zippers and organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials Two short straps and one long removalbe strap for carrying ease and style Brand name appliqué d on the front One zippered pocket at the back for additional space Two buckle design on the front for enhanced style Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
